chunks.text: On a school trip, we visited the town museum.
At the entrance, a large picture was painted by a local artist.
Inside, we learned that English is spoken in many countries around the world.
In the next room, there was an old book.
It is loved by many people.
Every year, it is read by many students.
In the far room, there was a model of an old castle.
“ This castle was built hundred years ago,” the guide told us.
When we went outside, the mountain behind us was loved by everyone in the town.
